items.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Western Conference first-round takeaways
items.description: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the Western Conference's first round.

items.headline: 2026 MLB ABS challenge system tracker: Team, player rankings
items.description: The ABS challenge system leaderboard ranks batters, pitchers, catchers, teams and umpires throughout the MLB season.

items.headline: Kapanen's 2nd goal of game with 1:54 remaining lifts Oilers over Ducks 4-3 in playoff opener
items.description: — Kasperi Kapanen scored his second goal of the game with 1:54 left in the third period to give the Edmonton Oilers a 4-3 victory over the Anaheim Ducks in the opener of their first-round playoff series Monday night.

items.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Schedule, scores, news and highlights
items.description: The Eastern and Western Conference playoff brackets are set after Sunday's games. See the full schedule of games.

items.headline: Wallabies playmaker Carter Gordon cleared of serious knee injury
items.description: Carter Gordon's latest setback won't be long-term with Queensland Reds coach Les Kiss hopeful the Test playmaker will still play a major role in the Super Rugby Pacific season.

items.headline: Carlos Cortes goes 4 for 5 with a homer and the Athletics beat the Mariners 6-4
items.description: — Carlos Cortes, Nick Kurtz and Shea Langeliers each hit a solo homer, and the Athletics overcame an early three-run deficit to defeat the Seattle Mariners 6-4 on Monday night.

items.headline: Bumrah bowls the first over, and 'it just kicks belief' into MI
items.description: Jasprit Bumrah bowled the first ball of a match in IPL 2026 for the first time against Gujarat Titans on Monday, and struck straightaway, breaking his duck in the process

items.headline: Johnston and Stars beat Wild 4-2 in Game 2 to even their first-round playoff series
items.description: — Wyatt Johnston had two unusual goals, Matt Duchene scored a tiebreaking power-play goal and had an assist, and the Dallas Stars beat the Minnesota Wild 4-2 in Game 2 on Monday night to even their first-round Western Conference series.

items.headline: Cease strikes out 12 in 5 innings and Guerrero homers as the Blue Jays beat the Angels 5-2
items.description: — Dylan Cease struck out 12 in five innings and Vladimir Guerrero Jr. had three hits, including a two-run homer, as the Toronto Blue Jays beat the...

items.headline: Worksafe looking into Elijah Hollands' MCG episode
items.description: Carlton's management of Elijah Hollands' public mental health episode will come under scrutiny from Worksafe Victoria.

items.headline: Leody Taveras hits first career grand slam and Orioles hold on for wild 7-5 win over Royals in 12
items.description: — Leody Taveras hit a grand slam during a five-run 12th inning, and the Baltimore Orioles held on for a wild 7-5 victory over the Royals on Monday night, handing Kansas City its eighth straight loss.

items.headline: Muncy, Rushing both homer twice as Dodgers rout Rockies 12-3 behind Wrobleski to split 4-game set
items.description: — Max Muncy went 4 for 4 with two homers and scored four times as the Los Angeles Dodgers hit five longballs to back Justin Wrobleski in a 12-3 victory Monday night over the Colorado Rockies.

items.headline: Martinook rescues Hurricanes in 2OT after overturned goal
items.description: Jordan Martinook, who was stopped on a penalty shot in the first overtime session after a potential winning goal was overturned, beat Linus Ullmark at 13:53 of the second overtime to help the Carolina Hurricanes past the Ottawa Senators 3-2 Monday night.

items.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs 2026: Bracket, schedule, scores, news
items.description: From the first round all the way through the Stanley Cup Final, ESPN has you covered this NHL postseason.

items.headline: GT's middle order 'exposed', but the problem might be higher up
items.description: "We shouldn't be allowing Rahul Tewatia or Shahrukh Khan [to face] lots of balls," Matthew Hayden, Gujarat Titans' batting coach, says after the collapse against Mumbai Indians
